inputs.label: Design Speed
inputs.businessContext: The design speed of the highway segment, typically between 40-140 km/h.

businessContext_i18n.en: The design speed of the highway segment, typically between 40-140 km/h.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Otoyol bölümünün tasarım hızı, tipik olarak 40-140 km/s arası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Entwurfsgeschwindigkeit des Autobahnabschnitts, typischerweise zwischen 40-140 km/h.

inputs.label: Maximum Superelevation Rate
inputs.businessContext: The maximum superelevation (cross-slope) rate applied to the curve, usually 4%-12%.

businessContext_i18n.en: The maximum superelevation (cross-slope) rate applied to the curve, usually 4%-12%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Viraja uygulanan maksimum dever (enine eğim) oranı, genellikle %4-%12.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die maximale Überhöhung (Querneigung) der Kurve, normalerweise 4%-12%.

inputs.label: Side Friction Factor
inputs.businessContext: The allowable side friction factor depending on design speed and surface conditions (e.g., 0.17 for low speeds, 0.10 for high speeds).

businessContext_i18n.en: The allowable side friction factor depending on design speed and surface conditions (e.g., 0.17 for low speeds, 0.10 for high speeds).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım hızına ve yüzey koşullarına bağlı olarak izin verilen yanal sürtünme katsayısı (örneğin, düşük hızlar için 0.17, yüksek hızlar için 0.10).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der zulässige Seitenreibungsbeiwert in Abhängigkeit von Entwurfsgeschwindigkeit und Oberflächenbedingungen (z. B. 0,17 für niedrige Geschwindigkeiten, 0,10 für hohe Geschwindigkeiten).

inputs.label: Desired Curve Radius
inputs.businessContext: The actual or desired radius of the horizontal curve. Set to 0 if unknown; otherwise used to compute required friction demand.

businessContext_i18n.en: The actual or desired radius of the horizontal curve. Set to 0 if unknown; otherwise used to compute required friction demand.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatay virajın gerçek veya istenen yarıçapı. Bilinmiyorsa 0 olarak ayarlayın; aksi takdirde gerekli sürtünme talebini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der tatsächliche oder gewünschte Radius der horizontalen Kurve. Auf 0 setzen, wenn unbekannt; andernfalls zur Berechnung des erforderlichen Reibungsbedarfs verwenden.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
